description.value: A cone of flames shoots from your hands. All creatures in a 15-foot cone take [[/damage 16 type=fire]] damage. Each target takes the full listed damage and makes their own save.

system.targetingSuccessScaling:
- 0 = Fails
- 1 = Half damage (8)
- 2 = Full damage (16)
- 3 = Enhanced damage (24) + ignited
system.weavingRoll: Fire Potential + Fire Mastery + Space Potential + Space Mastery
